_comment: QA engineers' first REAL assignment: close the zero-e2e gap on the unmerged schedule-creation branches (the work currently blocking these from shipping — see memory 'Schedule Dup QA'). QA is quality enablement (it unblocks shipping); it does not itself generate revenue. Mode is report-only/propose: study the branch, DRAFT the missing e2e, and (at activation, with QA_ASSIGNMENT_DISPATCH=1) dispatch the e2e CI workflow on the branch ref. Never merge — merges to prod repos are a human click. Branch refs verified locally 2026-06-05; the runner re-resolves the live open PR/branch at run time.

targets.note: origin/ci/e2e-gate also exists — prefer it if it carries the e2e job
iOS app is ~13/31 screens — degrade gracefully
scheduler-api has NO dedicated automation engineer — OPEN ROLE for hr_ops_manager to propose (api_automation_engineer: contract/e2e tests for schedule creation). qa_lead covers it in the interim.
